description: for-in iterator optimization type confusion - optimized iteration allowed writes to non-writable iterator indices to be compiled as direct slot stores. The vulnerable optimization was in js/src/vm/Iteration.cpp. A JSON.rawJSON object could be warmed so a for-in loop overwrote its non-writable rawJSON string slot with an integer; JSON.stringify later trusted the slot as a JSString* and crashed in the raw JSON fast path. The fix disables the unwritable-index iterator optimization so such writes go through the descriptor-checking slow path.

fixes.description: Bug 1989978: Don't support unwritable iterator indices r=jandem
